mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE STATUS = 1 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE(ID, NAME, CRON, ONCE, DESC_, ENABLED, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{cron}, #{once,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{desc}, #{enabled,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET STATUS = 0, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime} WHERE ID = #{id}
